checks.notes: Operator confirmed Input, Research Memo, Evidence, Quality, and Agent Timeline sections were discoverable by the screen reader.
Operator confirmed Market, Execution profile, Research question, Run, Upload, and Import CSV were keyboard reachable and named.
Operator confirmed run status changes were announced without relying on visual inspection.
Operator confirmed approval risk level, status, action, Approve, and Deny controls were announced with sufficient context.
Operator confirmed memo content, citations/evidence, cost/evaluation metrics, and timeline content were understandable through the screen reader.
Operator confirmed the primary Research Agent workflow had no keyboard trap, unexpected focus loss, or blocking unlabeled interactive control.

documents: non-sensitive research fixture documents already present in the local demo workspace

redaction_review.notes: Operator confirmed no credential material, proprietary customer data, or sensitive documents were used or recorded.

summary: Operator confirmed the Research Agent manual screen-reader protocol passed. Environment fields were populated from locally queried Windows, Chrome, and Windows Narrator versions; no credential material or sensitive documents were used.
